fyBudget.subtitle: Set the total budget for each financial year. Dashboard Budget Utilisation uses this value.
fyBudget.invalidMessage: Please enter a valid budget amount.
fyBudget.selectYearMessage: Please select a financial year before saving.
fyBudget.errorMessage: Could not save the budget. Please try again.

backup.title: Backup Data
backup.subtitle: Export works, documents, and budgets
backup.exportingMessage: Please wait while your data is exported.
backup.successMessage: Your backup file is ready to share.
backup.successSavedLocally: Backup saved on this device. You can find it in app storage or share it from a file manager.
backup.successWithWarnings: Backup created with warnings ({{count}} missing files).
backup.errorMessage: Could not create backup. Please try again.
backup.emptyMessage: There is no tender data saved on this device yet.
backup.sizeWarningMessage: This backup is about {{size}}. Some apps (for example WhatsApp) may not accept large files. Continue anyway?

errors.UNKNOWN: Could not create backup. Please try again.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_STORAGE: Not enough free storage on this device. Free up space and try again.
errors.PICKER_FAILED: Could not open the file picker.
errors.ARCHIVE_UNREADABLE: The backup file could not be read.

restore.title: Restore Data
restore.subtitle: Import from backup file
restore.importingMessage: Please wait while your data is replaced.
restore.confirmMessage: This will replace ALL works, documents, and budgets on this device with the backup ({{works}} works, exported {{date}}). This cannot be undone.
restore.invalidMessage: This file is not a valid Tender backup.
restore.successMessage: Your data has been restored from the backup.
restore.errorMessage: Could not restore backup. Your previous data was kept.

errors.UNKNOWN: Could not restore backup. Your previous data was kept.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_STORAGE: Not enough free storage to restore this backup. Free up space and try again.
errors.PICKER_FAILED: Could not open the file picker.
errors.ARCHIVE_UNREADABLE: The backup file could not be read.
errors.MANIFEST_MISSING: This file is missing backup metadata.
errors.DATABASE_MISSING: This backup is missing its database.
errors.DATABASE_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH: Backup database checksum does not match.
errors.FILES_FOLDER_MISSING: This backup is missing its document files.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT_VERSION: This backup was created with an unsupported format.
errors.SCHEMA_TOO_NEW: This backup needs a newer version of the app.
errors.SCHEMA_TOO_OLD: This backup is too old for this version of the app.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_CHECKSUM_ALGORITHM: Backup uses an unsupported checksum method.
errors.INVALID_ARCHIVE: This file is not a valid Tender backup.

logout.title: Log Out
logout.subtitle: End this session on this device
logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?

tooltipDemo.hint: Tap ⓘ next to a label to see contextual help. Tap outside to close. Includes Inputboxfield and FormToggleField demos.
